title: Secure ≥1 oncology reviewer and ≥1 patient advocate (COI on file)
context: oncology-glossary-multilingual cannot publish any patient-facing definition without both a credentialed oncology reviewer and a patient advocate signed off. Securing these reviewers is the M1 entry gate: if this task is not completed by 2026-10-31, source-definition work does not proceed to sign-off and the project holds at M0. Candidate types: academic cancer centers, oncology professional societies, volunteer clinician networks, cancer patient-advocacy organizations.
objective: Recruit and confirm at least 1 credentialed oncology reviewer and at least 1 patient advocate meeting the qualification criteria in reviewers-001, with COI declarations on file, ready to review the draft entries from draft-001.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 1 credentialed oncology reviewer (oncologist, oncology pharmacist, or oncology nurse with relevant scope) is confirmed and has signed a COI declaration
At least 1 patient advocate (health-literacy or patient-navigation competence) is confirmed and has signed a COI declaration; this person is different from the clinical reviewer
Both reviewers have received and acknowledged the applicable review checklists (review-001 and review-002) and the qualification/independence rules (reviewers-001)

A reviewer roster (docs/reviewer-roster.md or equivalent) records their credentials, language, COI status, and availability, with personal contact details handled out-of-band and not committed to the repo
If a reviewer pair is not secured by 2026-10-31, the project holds at M0 per the decision rule in PLAN.md
output: Confirmed reviewer roster (at least 1 oncology reviewer and 1 patient advocate, COI on file), recorded in docs/reviewer-roster.md with PII handled out-of-band
